seasonality: Stellar activity is event-driven, spiking around CBDC pilot announcements, MoneyGram/USDC corridor expansions, and SDF grant disbursements rather than following consistent seasonal patterns.
rationale: Stellar is a Layer-1 payment network, not a fee-accruing DeFi protocol in the traditional sense. Base transaction fees are burned/negligible (0.00001 XLM per operation, ~$0.000003 at current prices), meaning annualized protocol revenue in USD terms is not tracked by DefiLlama or Token Terminal on their free tiers — DefiLlama lists Stellar TVL at approximately $66M as of mid-2025 but does not report a revenue or fees figure. XLM has no staking yield mechanism (SDF discontinued the inflation pool in 2019), so both real and inflationary yield APR are null. P/S and P/TVL ratios cannot be computed without a reliable revenue numerator.
